name: Sweet Heat Hummus and Pita Bread
headline: Dip-tastic! | 4 servings
description:
If you haven’t had the pleasure, allow us to introduce you to this creamy Middle Eastern dip! It’s made with chickpeas, tahini, garlic, and lemon juice—plus peppers and spices for a bit of heat. This dip tastes delicious with just about anything: We’ve paired it with fluffy pita bread for dipping, but you can also spread it on sandwiches, serve alongside veggies, or use it as the base for a sauce.
Nutrition values for 1 piece of White Pita Bread is as follows: Calories 220, Total Fat 1.5g, Sat. Fat 0g, Cholest. 0mg, Sodium 590mg, Total Carb. 38g, Fiber 1g, Sugar 1g, Protein 6 g. 
Nutrition values for 2 TBSP of Sweet Heat Hummus is as follows: Calories 60, Total Fat 5g, Sat. Fat 0.5g, Cholest. 0mg, Sodium 110mg, Total Carb. 3g, Fiber 1g, Sugar 1g, Protein 1 g.
